message:
Fix scroll restore for lazy-loaded dashboard cards (#207)

The iterative restore retries scrolling as content loads, since
dashboard cards render lazily and the full page height isn't
available immediately. Tries up to 20 times (3s) until the scroll
position is within 50px of the target.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
